title: Warm Dense Kenyan Fish Casserole
description: A sweet and dense Kenyan dish featuring gruyere and yuzu-cure, perfect for pescatarians, this casserole is a delicious meal prep option.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium heat and saute the onion and garlic until softened.
Add the cod fillets to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked cod, gruyere cheese, yuzu juice, sweet potato, coconut milk, salt, and black pepper, and mix well.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and top with additional gruyere cheese.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the casserole from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Let the casserole cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the casserole warm, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
